intro: Visakhapatnam (Vizag) is Andhra Pradesh's largest city, combining a major port, steel plant, naval base, and growing IT sector. ShiftIndia's 430+ verified vendors cover all localities — from Steel Plant township to beachside Rushikonda and IT corridors in Madhurawada.
whyUs: Vizag's hilly terrain in Rushikonda and Bheemunipatnam requires careful driving. Our vendors know the coastal roads, steep gradients, and best access routes.

faqs.q: Do you cover Madhurawada IT corridor?
faqs.a: Yes — Madhurawada, Rushikonda, Bheemunipatnam and all IT corridors are fully covered.

Can you handle moves in hilly areas like Rushikonda?
